customBlockTypes.label: Domain accessor: field/reference has a value
Domain accessor: field/reference value as text
Domain accessor: field value as number
Domain accessor: multi-valued field/reference values are unique
Domain accessor: field values are unique across a block type
Domain accessor: statement input child count

blockDefinitions.tooltip: Checks that a required field or reference has a value
Checks the number of child blocks in a statement input
Checks the number of values in a multi-valued field or reference
Semantic expression validation, optionally expanded into lower-level blocks
Checks whether a field or reference has a value
Reads a field value as text
Reads a field value as a number
Counts values in a multi-valued field or reference
Checks that values inside a multi-valued field or reference are unique
Checks that field values are unique across all blocks of a type
Counts child blocks in a statement input
Checks the previous connected block type
